title: NEO 3.1-F Judging-Artifact Provenance Manifest (going-forward)
description: Records, per judging-class artifact (constraint | test_harness | profile_risk), the authoring session and gate under which it was created or last relaxed. Going-forward by default; retroactive backfill of pre-3.1-F artifacts is a named scoped follow-on (budget). gate_ref CONVENTION (P1-S4 / OQ2): a roadmap section 8 decision-log id, the same key an UNLOCK_RECORD.gate_ref uses to bind to the human-gate ledger (.neo/gates/HUMAN_GATE_LEDGER.json). AS18 does not itself consume this manifest; RT4-R1 (P1-S4, section 4.7 gate binding) enforces the gate_ref->human-gate binding in AS4 for authorized locked-path edits. The P1-S3 PENDING placeholders are backfilled below to the recorded S3 END-keep decision-log id.

entries.note: the class map itself; authored under P1-S3 START approval, kept at the recorded 2026-06-30 P1-S3 Raphael END=keep (roadmap section 8)

entries.authoring_session: P1-S3 (AS18 added); prior baseline P1-S1/S2; P1-S4 (AS4 PASS-WITH-AUTH + AS15 invariant_preserved)
entries.note: AS18 added in P1-S3 at the recorded 2026-06-30 END=keep; P1-S4 additively added the AS4 RT4-R1 third outcome. Consolidation re-pin happens at the DEV->PROD push gate, not per dev-edit.
